The search results are conclusive. 
A JSTOR page confirms the paper "Mathematics without numbers" by John G. Kemeny, published in *Daedalus*, Vol. 88, No. 4 (Fall, 1959), pp. 577–591.
 The automated checker's "correct" authors (S. Shapiro and G. Hellman, 1993) correspond to a different paper with the same title — the checker matched the wrong work entirely. The cited reference matches exactly on title, author, venue, and year.

EXPLANATION: The paper "Mathematics without numbers" by John G. Kemeny, published in *Daedalus* Vol. 88, No. 4 (1959), pp. 577–591 is confirmed by a JSTOR page and cited consistently across numerous academic publications. The automated checker's mismatched authors (Shapiro & Hellman, 1993) refer to a different paper sharing the same title.
